title: MineDash
body:
# MineDash This mod add contents from [Geometry Dash](https://www.youtube.com/RobTopGames/).
**Game idea is belonged to RobTop.** ## Features
### Added - Game Play entity (Click to bind controls, use arrow keys to move.) - Various building blocks (Some of them have builtin connected textures.) - Spikes - Rings & Pads - Hitbox Display (Open in config) ### Planned - Classic mode & First person mode - More play modes - Portals - Music system - Custom model loader ## FAQ ### Any Extra Dependencies? Only `Jupiter` is needed. ### Will `xxx` features be added? Some features have planned to add. Other features you can suggest but not all of them will be added such as more gravity directions or specific triggers. ~~Go to play GD directly is a better idea.~~ ## Discord https://discord.gg/NDzz2upqAk
